message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the expensive price range
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the north
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the moderate price range
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 4 nights starting from monday
If the booking fails how about 2 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:30 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on wednesday and should go to norwich
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
